arts.ttl: Liverpool contract offer ‘short’ of Van Dijk expectations
arts.sum: Liverpool have made a contract offer to Virgil van Dijk as the club look to tie the captain down to a new deal. Van Dijk’s current contract expires at the end of the season, with the Dutch defender one of three high-profile players whose deals are nearing their conclusion. Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold will […] The post Liverpool contract offer ‘short’ of Van Dijk expectations first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United and Aston Villa face similar PSR roadblock that has hampered Champions League ambition
arts.sum: One of the big talking points in English football this season is about the profit and sustainability (PSR) rules that have hit a number of Premier League clubs. The quartet began talking about PSR hurting the ambitions of new English clubs, Newcastle United and Aston Villa, in the past couple of seasons.
